# Ember Castle by Éden — Luxury Boutique Hotel, Gokarna

> The Epitome of Fine Living. A premier designer boutique hotel offering luxury stays, rooftop dining, wellness, and breathtaking scenic experiences in Gokarna, Karnataka, India.

## About Ember Castle

Ember Castle by Éden is a luxury boutique hotel situated in the serene coastal town of Gokarna, Karnataka. Designed for discerning travellers who seek elegance without compromise, Ember Castle blends nature-inspired architecture with refined modern aesthetics. Every detail — from the curated interiors to the bespoke hospitality — is crafted to deliver an unforgettable stay.

The property is operated under the Hotel Éden brand, known for its commitment to thoughtful refinement, elevated comfort, and immersive experiences rooted in the beauty of the local landscape.

## Canonical Website

- **URL**: https://embercastle.hoteleden.in
- **Brand**: Ember Castle by Éden
- **Parent Brand**: Hotel Éden

## Location

- **City**: Gokarna
- **State**: Karnataka
- **Country**: India
- **Region**: Coastal Karnataka (near Karwar)

## Core Offerings & Sections

- **Hero / Landing**: A cinematic introduction to Ember Castle — setting the mood for the fine living experience with immersive visuals and brand identity.
- **Sanctuaries (Rooms & Suites)**: Meticulously designed premium rooms and suites offering peace, luxury, and nature-framed views. Each sanctuary is crafted for comfort and elegance.
- **Dining**: Signature rooftop dining within a nature-inspired ambience. Guests enjoy sophisticated culinary experiences paired with panoramic views of Gokarna's landscape.
- **Experiences**: Curated wellness, relaxation, and local exploration activities for guests seeking more than just accommodation.
- **Features & Amenities**: World-class amenities including spa & wellness facilities, event spaces, concierge services, and premium in-room features.
- **Location & Map**: Strategically located for easy access from Gokarna town and major transport routes. Includes an interactive map for navigation.
- **FAQ**: Answers to common guest questions covering check-in/check-out, booking policies, dining, and local attractions.
- **Booking**: Seamless, hassle-free online booking to secure a stay at Ember Castle.

## Pages Index

- [Home (Landing Page)](https://embercastle.hoteleden.in/)
- [Privacy Policy](https://embercastle.hoteleden.in/privacy-policy)
- [Terms and Conditions](https://embercastle.hoteleden.in/terms-and-conditions)
- [Thank You](https://embercastle.hoteleden.in/thank-you)

## Key Highlights

- Designer boutique hotel with nature-inspired architecture
- Rooftop dining with panoramic views
- Luxury sanctuaries (rooms & suites) with premium amenities
- Spa, wellness, and curated local experiences
- Elegant event and banquet spaces
- Located in the tranquil coastal town of Gokarna, Karnataka

## Contact & Booking

Guests can book their stay directly via the official website: https://embercastle.hoteleden.in
Booking inquiry widgets are available throughout the site for easy reservation.

## Brand Identity

- **Tagline**: "The Epitome of Fine Living"
- **Design Philosophy**: Nature-inspired elegance, refined comfort, bespoke luxury
- **Target Audience**: Discerning travellers, couples, wellness seekers, corporate retreats

## Technical Notes

- Built with Next.js (React framework)
- Hosted at: https://embercastle.hoteleden.in
- Sitemap: https://embercastle.hoteleden.in/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://embercastle.hoteleden.in/robots.txt
